AI in Healthcare
Symposium
Reducing Cognitive Load in Clinical Decision-Making with GenAI-Powered Report Analysis
— a prototype and study proposal
Gideon Kowadlo  ·  Yoel Mittelberg  ·  Daniel Stiglitz
Introduction
Clinicians managing complex patients must manually navigate multiple longitudinal test reports; a cognitively demanding process that makes it difficult to identify trends and synthesise findings at the point of care. The burden of integrating these findings can lead to missed insights and suboptimal clinical decisions.
Aims
To develop a system that automatically extracts, summarises, and visualises trends from longitudinal patient test reports (structured and unstructured data), and surfaces personalised best-practice clinical recommendations.
Methods
A model-agnostic analyser utilises an LLM to iteratively processes patients' test reports to extract data points for key clinical metrics, plot trends and create a summary. Prompts include guardrails to avoid hallucinations. Best-practice recommendations are codified and dynamically presented via a personalised rule-based look-up.
System outputs (per report modality)
⬡ Tabular extraction of numerical and non-numerical trends
⬡ Synthesis: Assessment  ·  Classification  ·  Risk Level  ·  Suggestions  ·  Actions
Reportsper patient
→
LLMAnalyser
→
Plots &
Summaries
→
Clinical
Review
Results
The system analysed reports, extracted key information, presented trends over time in plot and table formats, provided text-based summaries and gave best-practice clinical recommendations. It was evaluated on respiratory function tests and echocardiograms. Results were reviewed by an experienced anaesthetist and found to be accurate.
Conclusions
This proof-of-concept demonstrates that a GenAI-based system can accurately synthesise longitudinal patient reports, visualise results, and surface personalised best-practice recommendations, significantly reducing clinician cognitive load. A prospective clinical trial is warranted.
Future Work
RAG-based dynamic best-practice guideline lookup
Clinician chat interface for interactive report discussion
Prospective clinical trial evaluation
